subject: [AAI] Upgrading to the latest images that include v25/v26 XSDs
commit_message:
[AAI] Upgrading to the latest images that include v25/v26 XSDs

Issues happening for SO so trying to upgrade
to the latest images for e2e test to pass
gating

Issue-ID: AAI-3435
Signed-off-by: wr148d <wr148d@att.com>
Change-Id: I666e243356e97885fa2a556ddfd524ef2458820e

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

infra tests: OK
HC: OK only 1 test fail due to DCAE refactoring, the test has been removed yesterday from the HC list
Smoke: basic_vm ok but 2 new errors

basic_network (usually one of the more stable smoke test)
2022-03-22 10:18:59,283 DEBUG 433:connectionpool.py(1) - http://so.api.simpledemo.onap.org:30277 "POST /onap/so/infra/serviceInstantiation/v7/serviceInstances HTTP/1.1" 500 43
2022-03-22 10:18:59,284 INFO 142:onap_service.py(1) - [None][Instantiate basic_network service a'la carte] response code: 500
just a 500 from SO..hard to guess why

basic_cnf_macro:
852dd6059a27","vnfInstanceId":"80a75f66-b5f0-4c31-aeaf-a684b0d1a862"},"requestStatus":{"requestState":"FAILED","statusMessage":"STATUS: Error Source: SDNC, Error Message: Failed to create self-serve assignment for vf-module with vf-module-id=1e1b8c1d-1cca-4aac-8a3e-8615ed53c4d9 with error: Failed to get RA assignments: Error from ConfigAssignmentNode FLOW STATUS: All Rollback flows have completed successfully ROLLBACK STATUS: Rollback has been completed 

Michal do you want to re-launch the gate to see if it is reproducible?

Patch Set 2:

@Morgan Richomme Yeah I did see those two failing which was odd but I noticed the same is failing on DCAE's gating run that doesnt have these changes so thinking this could not have caused it. From jira ticket comment "I do see two other smoke tests failing in SO (basic_cnf_macro & basic_network) but they are also failing without these changes so might be an issue in SO, if you see here those two also failed https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/127922 but the difference here is basic_vm passes which I was addressing, thanks" Please keep an eye on the results, as I don't believe this to be the culprit failing those or else it wouldn't have failed outside of this change.

Patch Set 2: -Code-Review

> Patch Set 2:
> 
> @Morgan Richomme Yeah I did see those two failing which was odd but I noticed the same is failing on DCAE's gating run that doesnt have these changes so thinking this could not have caused it. From jira ticket comment "I do see two other smoke tests failing in SO (basic_cnf_macro & basic_network) but they are also failing without these changes so might be an issue in SO, if you see here those two also failed https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/127922 but the difference here is basic_vm passes which I was addressing, thanks" Please keep an eye on the results, as I don't believe this to be the culprit failing those or else it wouldn't have failed outside of this change.

sure, usually we try to compare with the daily that is supposed to be stable.
At the moment it is unfortunately not really the case
basic_network used to be fine on the last 3 daily master runs but a 500 from SO can be a transient error

on the last weekly master https://logs.onap.org/onap-integration/weekly/onap_weekly_pod4_master/2022-02/25_20-26/ the 2 tests were OK, only the basic_vm were affected.
so I assume if it is reproducible and affects other patches, it means that a change breaking master has been merged and your patch is not responsible for that. We need to find when the behavior changed.
Unfortunately I am no more fully involved in ONAP and have no resource to investigate further

Patch Set 2:

>

> so I assume if it is reproducible and affects other patches, it means that a change breaking master has been merged and your patch is not responsible for that. We need to find when the behavior changed.
> Unfortunately I am no more fully involved in ONAP and have no resource to investigate further

Sure Morgan understandable. I also noticed that my configs were reverted in oom two days ago from v26 to v24, which may be what caused basic_vm to pass, I have a separate commit with these image updates and the version config update and would like to compare the gating runs, as I was unaware my configs were reverted on the last gating run for this.

Patch Set 2:

https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/oom/+/128001 is the other commit I have with v26 configured
